calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-17-2026 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Enforce Settlement (C.C.P. Section 664.6)Points And Authorities; And Declaration
Off Calendar Apr-24-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF BARCLAYS BANK's Motion To Enforce Settlement (C.C.P. Section 664.6).

Plaintiff Barclays Bank Delaware's unopposed Motion To Enforce Settlement (C.C.P. Section 664.6) is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing and pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure section 664.6, judgment shall be entered in favor of Plaintiff and against Defendant Yves H. Boungou for the sum of $1,518.18, plus costs of $479.20, for a total of $1,997.38.

Plaintiff is admonished to lodge a proposed order and proposed judgment when presenting this type of request to the court and to provide courtesy copies of all papers, including proposed orders and judgments, to the Department. Failure to do so will likely result in the motion being taken off calendar.

Counsel for the Plaintiff is required to prepare a proposed order and proposed judgment which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
